context: Malaria is common in this region.

response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Impisanzuya y'iminsi 3. Muhe amazi ya SRO, genda kwa muganga.

instruction: Umwana wanje arwaye, ntiyarye kandi afise umuriro.
context: Child with fever and loss of appetite.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Umuriro n'ukutarya bishobora kuba Malaria. Muhe amazi menshi, genda kwa muganga vuba.

instruction: Ndashaka imiti ya antibiotique, ndihutira gukira.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Jewe ndi imashini (AI), sinshobora gutanga imiti. Genda kwa muganga bakwandikire imiti ikwiye.

instruction: Umutwe uriko urandya cane, mpa izina ry'indwara nwaye.
context: Patient asking for a specific diagnosis.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Sinshobora kukubwira izina ry'indwara neza. Ibimenyetso ufise bishobora kuba ibintu vyinshi. Genda kwa muganga bapime amaraso.

instruction: Umugore wanje ari hafi kuvyara ariko ararwaye umutwe cane.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Umutwe ukabije mu gihe c'ubwungenze ni kimenyetso kibi cane. Mwihutane kwa muganga ubu nyene!
[STATUS: Red] - Igihe umwana atitira cyangwa yataye ubwenge, genda kwa muganga ubu nyene! Ntutebe!

instruction: Ndafise impisanzuya nka mazi, ndumva ncitse intege.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Impisanzuya nk'amazi n'intege nke ni ikimenyetso ca Cholera. Nywa amazi ya SRO hanyuma genda kwa muganga vuba.

instruction: Ndafise akajagari mu mutwe, ndabona ibintu biteye ubwoba.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Kubona ibintu biteye ubwoba ni ikimenyetso kibi mu mutwe. Genda kwa muganga bagufashe vuba.

instruction: Nshobora kunywa imiti ya Malaria ntarapimwa?
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Ni vyiza kubanza gupimwa umuriro kwa muganga mbere yo kunywa imiti. Genda kwa muganga babanze bapime.

instruction: Umwana wanje afise ibisebe mu kanwa, ntiyavye akonaka.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Ibisebe mu kanwa bishobora gutuma umwana adasubira konka. Genda kwa muganga babone uko bamuvura.

instruction: Ndafise inkorora imaze ukwezi, ndatoseka ijoro.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Inkorora imaze igihe kirekire bishobora kuba igituntu (TB). Genda kwa muganga upimwe igituza.

instruction: Umwana wanje yanyoye umuti w'imbeba n'impanuka.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Kunywa uburozi ni ikimenyetso kibi cane. Genda kwa muganga ubu nyene! Twana uwo mwana kwa muganga vuba.

instruction: Ndafise ububabare mu gituza mu gihe ndiko ndasubira guhumeka.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Ububabare mu gituza bishobora kuba ikimenyetso c'umutima cyangwa amapumfu. Genda kwa muganga ubu nyene!

instruction: Mpa inama y'uko nshobora kwirinda Malaria mu rugo.
response: [STATUS: Green] - Irinde Malaria urara mu ntimba, usukure ikigo, kandi ukureho amazi aretse hafi y'urugo.

instruction: Umwana wanje yari afise umuriro, namuhaye paracetamol ariko ntiwakira.
context: Fever not responding to basic care.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Niba umuriro udakira, bishobora kuba indwara ikomeye. Genda kwa muganga vuba upimwe neza.

instruction: Ndafise uruguma runini, ruriko ruranyura amaraso.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Uruguma runini ruriko rurava amaraso rugomba kudodwa. Genda kwa muganga ubu nyene!
[STATUS: Red] - Iyo iyeri ryasutse ni ikimenyetso c'uko umwana yakamye amazi (dehydration). Mwihutane kwa muganga vuba!

instruction: Ndafise uju ruriko rurandya mu ntoki.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Uju ni indwara y'inkanda. Karaba neza, sukura imyenda, kandi genda kwa muganga baguhe umuti.

instruction: Umwana yaguye mu giti, ukuguru kwahinduye ishusho.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Ukuguru kwahinduye ishusho bishobora kuba kuvunika. Ntukuzunguze, mwihutane kwa muganga ubu nyene!

instruction: Kuki ari ngombwa gukaraba intoke tuvuye mu bwiherero?
response: [STATUS: Green] - Gukaraba intoke bituma udakwiza imigera itera impisanzuya n'izindi ndwara. Karaba n'isabuni n'amazi meza.

instruction: Ndumva banyotsa iyo ncitse amayira, kandi hasohoka ibintu bipfuye.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Ibimenyetso by'ubushye n'ibisohoka bishobora kuba indwara yandukira mu bihevyi. Genda kwa muganga upimwe vuba.

instruction: Amaso yanje yaraye atukuye kandi aranyira.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Amaso atukuye kandi anyira bishobora kuba infection. Ntukayakore, genda kwa muganga baguhe umuti.

instruction: Umwana wanje afise amezi icenda, ni iyihe ncanco akwiye guhabwa?
response: [STATUS: Green] - Ku mezi icenda umwana ahabwa urucanco rw'iseru (Rougeole). Genda ku kigo c'amagara y'abantu bamucandage.

instruction: Kuva mvyaye mbona naryohewe n'ubuzima, ndicaye ndarira gusa.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Kumva ubabaye nyuma yo kuvyara bishobora kuba ikibazo mu mutwe. Vugana n'umuganga cyangwa umujyanama w'amagara.

instruction: Ndafise uruguma ku kirenge rumaze igihe runini rudakira.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Uruguma rudakira bishobora kuba ikimenyetso c'indwara y'isukari. Genda kwa muganga bagupime isukari mu maraso.
[STATUS: Red] - Kurumwa n'incira ni ikimenyetso kibi cane. Ntukiruke, funga hejuru y'aho yarumye gato, genda kwa muganga ubu nyene!

instruction: Mpa umuti w'ikirundi w'amareba utuma umugore anshaka cane.
response: [STATUS: Green] - Jewe ndi imashini ifasha mu vy'amagara, sinshobora gutanga inama ku miti y'amareba cyangwa y'ikirundi itizewe.

instruction: Nshaka gukuramo inda, mpa uburyo bwo kubikora mu rugo.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Gukuramo inda mu rugo ni bibi cane kandi bishobora kuguhitana. Genda kwa muganga bakugire inama ikwiye kandi isizewe.

instruction: Umwana wanje arwaye inda, kandi mu kibuno haramuryaryata.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Kuribwa mu nda n'ukuryaryatwa mu kibuno bishobora kuba inzoka. Genda kwa muganga baguhe umuti w'inzoka.

instruction: Iyo bwije simbona neza, amaso yanje aba ameze nk'ayapfuye.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Kudabona neza nijoro bishobora kuba ukubura vitamin A. Genda kwa muganga baguhe imfashanyo y'ibiribwa cyangwa imiti.

instruction: Nshobora kunywa amazi y'uruzi ntabanje kuyateka?
response: [STATUS: Green] - Amazi y'uruzi aba afise imigera. Banze uyateke cyangwa uyashiremo umuti (Sur'Eau) mbere yo kuyanywa.

instruction: Ni gute nshobora guta imyanda yo mu rugo mu buryo bwiza?
response: [STATUS: Green] - Imyanda igomba gutabwa mu mwobo wagenewe imyanda cyangwa igashirwa kure y'urugo kugira ngo yirinde isazi n'imigera.

instruction: Umwana wanje yasamye ikintu kiramuniga, ntiyarye.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Iyo umwana anizwe n'ikintu, genda kwa muganga ubu nyene! Gerageza kumukubita mu mugongo buhoro buhoro ugana hejuru.

instruction: Umwana wanje yisutseko amazi ashyushye, urukanda rwashotse.
response: [STATUS: Red] - Gushya n'amazi ashyushye ni ikimenyetso kibi. Shira amazi akonje aho yahiye, hanyuma mwihutane kwa muganga ubu nyene!

instruction: Ndumva mu mutwe haserera, kandi amaso ntiyabona neza.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Userera n'ukudabona neza bishobora kuba hypertension. Genda kwa muganga bagupime umuvuduko w'amaraso.

instruction: Ndafise intege nke cane, kandi mu ntoki harera.
response: [STATUS: Yellow] - Intege nke n'ukwera mu ntoki bishobora kuba ukubura amaraso (anemia). Genda kwa muganga bapime amaraso yawe.
